violations.text: Gasket of the walk-in freezer and handle of the 1-door reach-in are not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. An employee certified through an approved food safety management course must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as Certified Food Safety Manager. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of sanitizing buckets was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 - 400 ppm. Sanitizer was adjusted and at proper concentration at the end of the inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the walk-in cooler and milk chest cooler #2. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Chicken was observed held at 130 degrees Fahrenheit, and taco meat was observed held at 120 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, both food items were cooked a half hour prior to inspection. Both food items were reheated to above 165 degrees. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

The door (2b) to the outside, located in the gym, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

The 1 door reach-in was observed holding an ambient temperature of 44 DF and in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or lower. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2025

The door to the outside, located on the right side of the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment is to repair door. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The ceiling in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

The condensate from the chest freezer refrigeration is gathering in excess in the machine (frozen). Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Establishment is to defrost machine. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
The cardboard outside of the establishment was observed in excess along the side of the building. Trash and recyclables must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The floor under the hot hold unit on the serving line is in poor repair. The floor by the walk in freezer is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023
Refrigerator door gasket on the walk in freezer was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed by the back delivery door area. Litter was observed across the outside cafeteria seating area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2023
The floor by the walk in freezer is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice is not to be used, establishment to have ice machine cleaned and provide evidence to RIDOH New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023

Wood is in the construction of prep tables. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
The 3 door cold hold low boy located in the front of the serving line was observed leaking. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
Cardboard was observed outside not in receptacle for disposal. Refuse must be in a covered receptacle. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
